title: Unsanded
description: An 8px font with wide vertical strokes inspired by Chicago and Craft Sans.
body: An 8px font with wide vertical strokes inspired by [Chicago](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chicago_(typeface)) and [Craft Sans](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/craft-sans-font). Has partial support for accented characters. ## Questions I Predict You'll Ask #### Sphinx of black quartz? Somewhat uncommon pangram. More flavorful than "quick brown fox". #### Handgloves? Semi-common typography test word. It's short and contains most of the distinctive shapes in a Latin font. #### Unsanded? "Una Sans" but not. ## Testimonials > man this font is chungy — Kat > *patiently waits for Unsanded to be on Modrinth* — Cynthia
